arts.ttl: Lille predicted XI v Le Havre: Chuba Akpom to make first start?
arts.sum: Chuba Akpom made his first appearance for Lille OSC in their shock defeat to USL Dunkerque in the Coupe de France. Could he be set for his first start for…

arts.ttl: Henderson's heated exchange about Ajax future
arts.sum: Ajax captain Jordan Henderson hits back at reports that he no longer wanted to play for the club and that he was linked with a move to Monaco. Henderson was speaking in a post-match news conference following Sunday's 2-1 victory over Feyenoord.
